pages.raw_text:
Many local women prominent
In the cause of woman's suffrage
have expressed their thanks to The
Press for the interest it has taken
In the question by running a ballot
In this paper, and have expressed
their willingness to talk on the sub
Ject. The ballots are being re-
ceived In every mail.


"Taxation without representation N
10 tyranny" said Mrs. George C..
Z Campbell, member of the Wom-
ans Suffrage club. "One Of tho
principal reasons, to my mind, why
women should have a right to vote
is because they pay taxes. For
eigners are allowed to come Into
this country and after they have
become naturalized In years time
they are allowed to say how our
money shall be dispensed. They
are often Italians and Cinnamon
who are absolutely Ignorant In
every respect.


AT the present time in Louisiana
they have the old Napoleon law,
which deprives women who have
earned and saved money before
their marriage the privilege of
drawing the same from the bank
